# Contact Channels

Acme Shop offers multiple contact channels for customer support to cater to different preferences. For immediate assistance, a 24/7 live chat is available on their website, where customers can quickly resolve issues like order tracking and returns. For less urgent matters, customers can email support@acmeshop.com, with a response time of up to 24 hours. Additionally, a customer support hotline is accessible Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM for those who prefer to speak with a representative directly, though standard carrier rates may apply.

[Source: customer_support.md#contact-channels]
